description:
Create a new Product Attribute Set in iDempiere with the following configuration:

- Search Key: SER_LOT_TRACK
- Name: Serialized Lot Tracking
- Description: Attribute set for products requiring serial number and lot number tracking with 365-day guarantee
- Serial No: Enabled
- Lot: Enabled
- Guarantee Days: 365
- Instance Attribute: Enabled
- Mandatory Type: Not Mandatory

You are logged into iDempiere as GardenAdmin in the GardenWorld client. The application is open in Firefox.
